title: Problem-Driven Design Patterns
description: Add pricing, notifications, imports, commands, and persistence without turning patterns into ceremony. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of an extensible library operations toolkit while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Select patterns from a demonstrated variation or boundary problem.
Compare simpler functions and composition before adding pattern structure.
Test extension and failure behavior through stable roles.
